Profile

Currently enrolled in a dual program for obtaining a Professional degree and MSc. degree in Electronic Engineering. Responsible, proactive and enthusiastic. With an affection to solve challenging problems, with a critic and constructive perspective. Searching for opportunities that allow me to reach goals and expand my professional horizon. Always wants to be improving my research, management and leadership skills.

Education

MSc in Electronic Engineering

2017 - Expected graduation Jully 2019
Technical University Federico Santa Maria

Electronic Engineering

2012 - Expected graduation Jully 2019
Technical University Federico Santa Maria

Experience

Research assistant

July 2016 - December 2018
UTFSM, Valparaíso, Chile

Assistance for a government funded project caller “Collaborative drones and multimodal vision for monitoring automation of wildfires”. its aims were to study the reliability of using multiple drones for detection, monitoring and analysis of wildfires. Worked at different stages:

  • Selection of tools and framework.
  • Development of the navigation UI and communication between multiple entities in the system.
  • Research of collaborative drones methods for wildfire analysis.
  • A thesis in Structure From Motion for real-time 3D mapping.

For mor info in the project, visit here.

Research internship

January 2018 - July 2018
Universite de Moncton, Moncton, Canada

Thanks to the Canada-Chile Leadership Exchange Scholarships, I went for six months with a work visa as a researcher. Made one publication in SPIE conference, and a first experience in english dominant country.

Professional internship

December 2016 - February 2017
Cotalker S.P.A, Santiago, Chile

Development of tools for automation of unit testing, compression and minification processes in the continous integration pipeline for the WebApp of Cotalker.

Industrial internship

January 2016 - March 2016
Alstom Chile S.A, Santiago, Chile

Build a minimal web platform for aquisition, storage and online visualization of data from a testing devise mounted on train’s engines while they were operative.

Teaching & Laboratory assistant

2015 - 2018
UTFSM, Valparaíso, Chile

On three instances during my studies worked as assistant for a class:

  • 2015: Computer structures laboratory. Helped students developing the laboratory activities and theyr projects.
  • 2017: Digital image processing class and laboratory. Prepared the lab activites and corrections of quizes.
  • 2018: Digital image processing class and laboratory.

Publications

I have participated in a few publications in conferences as co-author. Mainly writing, diagraming or researching.

UAVs for wildland fires
Moulay A. Akhloufi, Nicolás A. Castro, Andy Couturier
Autonomous Systems: Sensors, Vehicles, Security, and the Internet of Everything, 2018
Accurate fire detection through fully convolutional network
Angelo Gonzalez etal.
Latin American Conference on Networked and Electronic Media, 2017

Projects

I am devoted to my only big project, which is my current thesis subject.

Sensor guided structure from motion for real-time 3D mapping - This project aims to study the usage of on-board sensors on mobile agens for 3D envirnment structure retrieval.
